title: Phase 1 Successfully Completed in World's First Initiative to Promote SAF Use and Advance Decarbonize of Aviation
content: The first phase of demonstration testing of a new trading scheme for Scope 3 environmental value to promote the use of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) is completed in Japan. The project will now move into a second phase with more companies involved, aiming to increase awareness and trading activity. The partners will also explore strategies for the schemeâ€™s eventual full-scale implementation.
author: Analysts Account
